title: Wolf's Clothing
writer: Arthur Somers Roche, Jack Wagner, Darryl F. Zanuck
actors: Monte Blue, Patsy Ruth Miller, John Miljan
plot: Barry Baline, a guard at a subway station, has worked at his job for six years without a day off. One New Year's Eve he's told that he won't be needed until the next morning, so he decides to go out for a night on the town. As it ...
